tools.name: flipr_bridge_status
tools.description: Poll status of a Solana payment bridge after a 202 response from flipr_flip. Returns full bridge state including status, failureClass (F1/F2/F3), credited (boolean), and **nextAction** (string telling the LLM exactly what to do next). Read nextAction first — it tells you whether to retry, poll again

Each strategy shows expected cost in ETH, number of flips n

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "flipr_opportunity" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Analyze current Flipr.bet opportunity before deciding to flip. Returns twoHourPot and jackpot (values in ETH), top streak counts, flipPriceUSD, and two strategi…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

evidence.snippet: Retrieve static game rules, denomination model, pot mechanics, and strategy explanations. Free -- no payment required. Returns: flip cost, randomness source (Ch…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: flipr_opportunity_subscribe, flipr_referral_link · Private data: flipr_withdraw, flipr_agent_stats, flipr_referral_payout_address, flipr_referral_payout_status · Public sink: flipr_opportunity_subscribe, flipr_opportunity_unsubscribe, flipr_referral_register, flipr_referral_link · Destructive: flipr_flip, flipr_opportunity_unsubscribe.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: flipr_opportunity_subscribe, flipr_referral_link · Private data: flipr_withdraw, flipr_agent_stats, flipr_referral_payout_address, flipr_referral_payout_status · Public sink: flipr_opportunity_subscribe, flipr_opportunity_unsubscribe, flipr_referral_register, flipr_referral_link · Destructive: flipr_flip, flipr_opportunity_unsubscribe

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

detail: Tool "flipr_pot" changed its description with no version change. Silent description changes are how a trusted server turns malicious after review.

evidence.snippet: before: "Withdraw accumulated ETH from your Flipr agent wallet to a specified address. Returns transaction hash. Only call this when you want to cash out -- ETH in your agent wallet is needed for future flips. Cost: $0.001 USDC. Accepts payment on Base mainnet OR Solana mainnet (auto-bridged). See http://loc" → after: "Get current Flipr.bet pot balances and competition state. Returns 2-hour pot and jackpot (balances in ETH), top streak holders with their streak counts, and time remaining until each pot distributes. Use this to monitor pot balances. The jackpot is target-based (hit the target streak to win) -- the "

remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
